[{"action": "createScreenGui", "name": "ClickerGUI", "parent": "StarterGui"}, {"action": "createTextButton", "name": "ClickButton", "parent": "ClickerGUI", "properties": {"Size": [0.2, 0.1], "Position": [0.4, 0.4], "Text": "Click!", "BackgroundColor3": [1, 0, 0]}}, {"action": "createTextLabel", "name": "ScoreLabel", "parent": "ClickerGUI", "properties": {"Size": [0.2, 0.1], "Position": [0.4, 0.5], "Text": "Score: 0", "BackgroundColor3": [1, 1, 1]}}, {"action": "createScript", "name": "ClickerScript", "parent": "ClickerGUI", "content": "-- Local variables
local score = 0

-- Function to update the score label
local function updateScoreLabel()
	script.Parent.ScoreLabel.Text = "Score: " .. score
end

-- Function to handle the button click
local function onButtonClick()
	score = score + 1
	updateScoreLabel()
end

-- Connect the button click event
script.Parent.ClickButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(onButtonClick)

-- Initialize the score label
updateScoreLabel()"}]
